name: SQL & Advanced Analytics Queries
description: Constructing complex SQL queries for user segment profiling, cohort tracking, ETL automation, and denormalized reporting schemas.
evidence: Optimized reporting queries reducing telemetry latency by 95% at TechInnovate.
Built automated ETL pipelines consolidating multi-source logs into a single denormalized schema.

name: Product Roadmap & Strategy
description: Translating complex business problems into structured product milestones with success metrics, release phases, and stakeholder alignment maps.
evidence: Authored 14 product specifications adopted directly into engineering backlogs.
Led roadmap session with Director of Engineering to define Phase 1-3 delivery milestones.
certifications: Certified Scrum Product Owner (CSPO) — Scrum Alliance

name: User Story Mapping & Agile Backlog
description: Facilitating story mapping sessions, writing prioritized user stories, and managing sprint backlogs aligned with engineering delivery cycles.
evidence: Authored 14 user stories with acceptance criteria adopted into engineering sprint.
Facilitated 6 weekly sprint backlog grooming sessions.

name: Requirements Elicitation & Process Modeling
description: Facilitating multi-stakeholder workshops to define project constraints, model AS-IS and TO-BE process flows, and draft PRD specifications.
evidence: Conducted 12 stakeholder interviews mapping data bottlenecks to product requirements.
Produced business requirements documentation adopted by 3 engineering squads.

name: User Research & Usability Testing
description: Conducting structured user interviews, usability sessions, and synthesizing findings into design recommendations.
evidence: Conducted 12 internal user interviews on analytics access workflows.
Synthesised usability notes into 3 identified friction zones.

name: Data Analysis & Telemetry Metrics
description: Interpreting activation funnels, cohort retention curves, and release performance metrics to inform product decisions.
evidence: Presented executive telemetry reports to VP of Product reducing decision latency from 5 days to 2 hours.
Built cohort activation dashboards tracking 6 user lifecycle stages.

name: TypeScript & Next.js Development
description: Building production-grade full-stack applications using Next.js 15 App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.
evidence: Built CareerOS — a full-stack interactive PM portfolio platform from scratch.
Integrated Framer Motion, GSAP, and Recharts for enterprise-grade UI animations.

name: Cross-functional Stakeholder Management
description: Aligning product goals across engineering, design, and business units through structured communication, PRD workshops, and escalation paths.
evidence: Presented product roadmap to Director of Engineering and VP of Product in monthly reviews.
Aligned 4 business units on a shared telemetry metric taxonomy.
